{"id":"project-LICHEN-14mr","title":"to_dict() exposes mutable internal errors list by reference","description":"## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/metrics.py:85

## Description
The to_dict() method returns self.errors directly without copying, while sets are safely converted via sorted(). If a caller modifies the returned dictionary's 'errors' entry (e.g., d['errors'].append('x') or d['errors'].clear()), it mutates the NodeMetrics' internal state, violating encapsulation.

## Failure Scenario
Caller does `d = node.metrics.to_dict(); d['errors'].clear()` to sanitize output before logging. This silently clears all errors from the live NodeMetrics instance, corrupting future diagnostics.

## Category
correctness","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-13T04:16:39.333558Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-13T04:16:39.333595Z"}

new_value: to_dict now uses .copy() for errors list. All 3 Python beads fixed together. 3x codereview passes clean, no new P0-P2.
